refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions for each phase allows targeted design parameters and implementation modules to optimize each phase, improving clarity and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

candidate_dps: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency
DP2: Optimize vehicle navigation and path planning for travel phase efficiency
DP3: Optimize vehicle dumping mechanism and control for dump phase efficiency
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address each sub-FR distinctly

potential_sources: Interdependencies between phases (e.g., load phase delays impacting travel phase start)
Shared vehicle control systems affecting multiple phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but share vehicle control hardware/software; careful interface design needed to avoid unintended coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control systems can be modularized per phase
Risk that optimization in one phase may degrade performance in another if not coordinated
High safety criticality requires robust fail-safe design in all DPs
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions and shared control resources.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution for monitoring

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: NGHE Solution sends operational commands and cycle targets to Vehicle

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends safety alerts to Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone between Vehicle, Teleoperation, Safety Services, and NGHE Solution

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module contains core physical and control systems for cycle phases; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination and monitoring but does not directly implement cycle phase controls.
Teleoperation module may influence vehicle control but is not primary for cycle time optimization.
Safety Services handles alerts and safety policies, not cycle time control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the primary owner of cycle time optimization DPs due to direct control over physical and control systems for load, travel, and dump phases.
containment_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic into Teleoperation or NGHE Solution modules if interfaces are not well defined
Risk of duplicated control algorithms across modules if ownership boundaries are unclear
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and ownership boundaries to prevent diffusion and duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional decomposition into load, travel, and dump phases is clear and maps well to distinct DPs optimizing each phase.

diffusion_risks: Control logic diffusion risk between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Potential overlap in monitoring functions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for cycle time DPs; interfaces to other modules are well identified.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times and monitoring telemetry data from Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to Vehicle module with supporting interfaces to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Strengthen interface definitions to reduce diffusion risk
Plan verification tests for each sub-FR phase cycle time

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment is consistent, with clear ownership and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible and align with stakeholder constraints.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

revise.why: To introduce explicit coordination DP/interface managing phase transitions and shared control resources.

assumptions: Vehicle control systems can be modularized per cycle phase
Interfaces between modules will be clearly defined and enforced
open_risks: Diffusion of control logic across modules
Phase optimization trade-offs impacting overall cycle time
High safety criticality requiring robust fail-safe mechanisms
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements per phase under operational conditions
Interface compliance and control logic ownership validation
Safety validation of control systems during cycle phases
